assertions.assertion: Creates a static RsaSecurityKey using RSA.Create(2048) or similar
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows private static readonly RsaSecurityKey with RSA.Create(2048)

assertions.assertion: The CreateAccessToken method accepts subject, audience, and claims parameters
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows CreateAccessToken(string subject, string audience, IEnumerable<Claim> claims, ...)

assertions.assertion: Uses SecurityTokenDescriptor and JsonWebTokenHandler (or JwtSecurityTokenHandler) to create the token
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows SecurityTokenDescriptor with new JsonWebTokenHandler().CreateToken(tokenDescriptor)

assertions.assertion: The WebApplicationFactory replaces JWT Bearer options with TokenValidationParameters that set IssuerSigningKey to the test key
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows IssuerSigningKey = TestTokenFactory.SigningKey in TokenValidationParameters

assertions.assertion: Sets ValidAudience to 'my-api' in the token validation parameters
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows ValidAudience = 'my-api' in the TokenValidationParameters
